name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Cloud Object Shared (O365)
notes: This Building Block defines when a sharing policy in Office 365 is set to default policy. Items such as calendar, contacts, email, etc can be shared.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Cloud Object Shared (O365) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Policy Added, Audit.Update Activity Succeeded
when the event matches Audit Flags (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)true
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Cloud Object Shared (O365) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Policy Added, Audit.Update Activity Succeeded
AND when the event matches Audit Flags (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)true
